programmeDescription: Two full-body sessions per week using only bodyweight — suitable for home training with a weight-loss goal.
coachIntro: Two sessions a week is a solid start. Combined with being active on your off days, this will make a real difference.
coachRationale: Bodyweight circuits keep heart rate elevated, burning calories while building functional strength. Two sessions per week is realistic for getting started.
personalisationNotes: Weight loss goal: exercises selected for elevated heart rate and calorie burn.
Beginner-friendly movement patterns with low injury risk.
weeklyProgression: Add one rep to each exercise each week. When bodyweight becomes easy, slow down the tempo or add a pause at the bottom position.

workouts.briefDescription: Lower-body emphasis with core and upper body support.

exercises.coachingNote: Sit back and keep your chest up.

workouts.briefDescription: Upper-body emphasis with lower body support.
